creator: rs@paket.ua
text:
(In reply to Ivan from comment #7)


Hello Ivan,

in old version 1.32.x we have on cameras Buffer 20-30 and no problem, but now when 20-30 then show warnings in log, when i increase buffer then show warning limit up more buffer.
